plan_summary.primary_goal: Generate evidence over 48 months to inform national 4DWW labor reform via formal-sector pilots with 50% SME inclusion.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests whether the INR 2,000 crore envelope, 70/30 split, and 10% contingency can absorb the named stress-test shocks (post-incentive overrun, SME redesign, legal delay) while sustaining voluntary opt-in above the load-bearing threshold.

key_values.label: Total program budget
key_values.comment: Fixed envelope for the 48-month pilot covering formal track, informal track, and contingency.

key_values.label: Formal sector budget share
key_values.comment: Share of total budget routed to the formal pilot track (incentives and operations).

key_values.label: Contingency budget share
key_values.comment: Ring-fenced reserve to absorb high-severity political or data-integrity shocks.

key_values.label: Post-incentive adoption-failure overrun
key_values.comment: Stress-test cost of widespread adoption failure after incentives expire; up to 15% budget overrun.
key_values.source_text: Widespread adoption failure post-incentive causes up to 15% budget overrun, INR 300 crore

key_values.label: SME cohort failure redesign cost
key_values.comment: Stress-test cost if the 50% SME mandate triggers small-firm failure and forces toolkit re-design.
key_values.source_text: 50% SME mandate causes high small-firm failure, rollout toolkit becomes unusable, costing INR 400 crore

key_values.label: Legal/regulatory friction sunk cost
key_values.comment: Midpoint of INR 150-300 crore sunk cost from failing to navigate concurrent state/central labor law.
key_values.source_text: 3-6 month pilot delay; potential cohort re-selection; INR 150-300 crore sunk cost

key_values.label: Required voluntary opt-in rate
key_values.comment: Load-bearing assumption: opt-in must remain above this share through the first 24 months.
key_values.source_text: Voluntary opt-in participation rates remain above seventy-five percent throughout the first twenty-four months

key_values.label: Mandatory SME cohort share
key_values.comment: Minimum SME representation by company count; drives representativeness and administrative burden.
key_values.source_text: SME cohort must be 50% minimum by count

derived_questions.question: Does realized voluntary opt-in clear the 75% load-bearing threshold?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: If opt-in falls below the threshold, the evidence base is too thin to support national reform.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Realized voluntary opt-in rate
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Needed to test whether the load-bearing 75% opt-in assumption actually holds in the pilot.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Benchmark from analogous voluntary policy pilots; bound 0.55-0.90 with base near 0.75.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Actual SME admin hours per week
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Compared against the 2-hour ASI target to test whether SME compliance is sustainable.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Pre-pilot time-and-motion study on a sample SME cohort; bound 1.5-5 hours.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: SME admin hours per week target
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: The ASI threshold the SME compliance design must beat; ≤2 worker-hours per week.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Use stated plan target of 2.0 hours; sensitivity bound 1.5-2.5.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Realized SME cohort share
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Compared against the 50% mandate to test whether selection bias risk materialized.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Track confirmed signed MOUs; bound 0.35-0.6 with base near 0.5.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Formal sector budget
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Anchors the cost base from which post-incentive overruns and legal friction will be debited.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Ring-fenced contingency reserve
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Sizes the single named reserve that absorbs all high-severity shocks in the plan's risk register.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Contingency buffer after combined shocks
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether the ring-fenced reserve absorbs the named high-severity shocks; positive means coverage.

recommended_first_calculations.label: SME administrative simplicity margin
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether the SME compliance burden clears the ASI target; positive means within tolerance.

recommended_first_calculations.label: SME cohort representation margin
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether the 50% SME mandate is met; failure invalidates the generalizability of evidence.

unmodelled_gates.label: State Labor Department sign-off
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Pilot launch requires written No Objection affidavits from State Labour Secretaries by Month 3 and joint sign-off on operational gates.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Pilots cannot legally operate in non-cooperating states; PMO loses tie-breaking authority and decision gates stall.

unmodelled_gates.label: Executive notification legal validity
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: The pilot relies on executive notifications rather than legislative amendment to alter workday/overtime definitions for 24 months.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Jurisdictional litigation invalidates the INR 2,000 crore evidence mandate.

unmodelled_gates.label: PII tokenization compliance
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Data privacy compliance under NITI Aayog/MeitY rules is required for third-party auditor access to UMF data.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Audit pipeline blocked; evidence cannot be independently verified and the pilot's central deliverable fails.
